channel.title: z101ctrl
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2023–2024, Franco Zalazar; all rights reserved.

item.title: My personal server setup
item.description: During the COVID pandemic I found myself with quite an amount of free time, so I became really obsessed with Linux systems. Approximately one and a half year ago I got an old Lenovo M82 Workstation into my hands, so I opted to repurpose it into a server. In this post I’m describing the general setup of my server, that has been running with almost no downtime for ten months.

item.title: About
item.description: I am a Data Science student at UBA (Universidad de Buenos Aires) and a huge computer science enthusiast. In this page I’ll be uploading several university-related stuff + other things. If you notice something wrong or just want to contact me, feel free to send me an e-mail.

item.title: Notas cálculo numérico
item.description: .toggle-toc { cursor: pointer; display: flex; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: center; } #toc { margin-top: 16px; } .arrow-icon { margin-left: 8px; transition: transform 0.3s ease; transform: rotate(90deg); } document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() { var tocTitle = document.getElementById('toc-title'); var tocDiv = document.getElementById('toc'); var arrowIcon = document.getElementById('arrow-icon'); tocDiv.style.display = 'block'; tocTitle.addEventListener('click', function() { if (tocDiv.style.display === 'none' || tocDiv.style.display === '') { tocDiv.style.display = 'block'; } else { tocDiv.style.display = 'none'; } }); }); ► Table Of Contents Cota para el error global para métodos de un paso Convergencia Norma de una matriz Número de condición de una matriz Aplicación Condición de una matriz y matrices singulares Chebyshev en $[a,b]$ Métodos de un paso Cota para el error global para métodos de un paso Siendo $h = \frac{ \left(T - t_0 \right)}{n}$ con el método de un paso dado por $x_{i+1} = x_{i} + h\Phi\left( t_{i}, x_{i}, h \right)$ con $\Phi$ función Lipschitz en la segunda variable.

item.title: Notas álgebra 1
item.description: .toggle-toc { cursor: pointer; display: flex; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: center; } #toc { margin-top: 16px; } .arrow-icon { margin-left: 8px; transition: transform 0.3s ease; transform: rotate(90deg); } document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() { var tocTitle = document.getElementById('toc-title'); var tocDiv = document.getElementById('toc'); var arrowIcon = document.getElementById('arrow-icon'); tocDiv.style.display = 'block'; tocTitle.addEventListener('click', function() { if (tocDiv.style.display === 'none' || tocDiv.style.display === '') { tocDiv.style.display = 'block'; } else { tocDiv.style.display = 'none'; } }); }); ► Table Of Contents Definición Relación en un conjunto Tipos de relaciones Relaciones de orden y equivalencia Funciones Clasificación de funciones Divisibilidad Números primos y compuestos Congruencia Algoritmo de división Congruencia y resto Relaciones Definición Sean $A$ y $B$ conjuntos.

item.title: Resumen análisis 1
item.description: Resumen realizado con el nuevo programa de la materia. .toggle-toc { cursor: pointer; display: flex; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: center; } #toc { margin-top: 16px; } .arrow-icon { margin-left: 8px; transition: transform 0.3s ease; transform: rotate(90deg); } document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() { var tocTitle = document.getElementById('toc-title'); var tocDiv = document.getElementById('toc'); var arrowIcon = document.getElementById('arrow-icon'); tocDiv.style.display = 'block'; tocTitle.addEventListener('click', function() { if (tocDiv.style.display === 'none' || tocDiv.style.display === '') { tocDiv.style.display = 'block'; } else { tocDiv.

item.title: Resumen física 4
item.description: Apuntes tomados 2C de 2022, dado por C. Giribet. Se transcribieron los conceptos importantes de su apunte. Las demostraciones de los conceptos son triviales y quedan como ejercicio para el lector. .toggle-toc { cursor: pointer; display: flex; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: center; } #toc { margin-top: 16px; } .arrow-icon { margin-left: 8px; transition: transform 0.3s ease; transform: rotate(90deg); } document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() { var tocTitle = document.getElementById('toc-title'); var tocDiv = document.
